title: %Error: Function Argument expects a CLASSREFDTYPE 'axi_ax_beat', got CLASSREFDTYPE 'axi_ax_beat__A30_I2_U5'  PLUS Verilator internal fault

features.name: parameterized class typedef with nested type access via scope operator
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class typedef that uses :: operator to access a type member from another parameterized class typedef

features.name: task output argument with typedef parameterized type
features.description: Code should include a task with an output argument typed to a typedef of a parameterized class type, called with an automatic variable

features.name: parameterized class typedef chain instantiation
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class that typedefs another parameterized class and instantiates it with localparam values
